channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: 1948 MG TC Special Roadster: A Classic Postwar British Roadster
item.description: The 1948 MG TC Special Roadster is presented as one of the most iconic and charming British sports cars of the immediate postwar era. Produced between 1945 and 1949, the MG TC played a key role in rev...

item.title: Analysts Discuss How Concerns About Trump's Health Could Affect His Public Image
item.description: A panel discussion on MSNBC's 'The Weeknight' focused on how President Donald Trump's recent health concerns and visible signs of aging may be affecting the political image he has cultivated for years...

item.title: Tanzania upgrades electricity network with new poles to reduce power outages
item.description: Tanzania has started a nationwide programme aimed at improving its electricity distribution system by replacing old and weak power infrastructure. The Tanzania Electric Supply Company (TANESCO) is lea...

item.title: Trump Administration Plans Ebola Quarantine and Treatment Program for Americans in Kenya
item.description: According to reporting cited from The New York Times, the Trump administration is preparing a plan to handle Americans exposed to the Ebola virus outside the United States by sending them to Kenya for...

item.title: Eleventh Circuit judge privately reprimanded over alleged workplace affair in chambers
item.description: A federal district judge under the Eleventh Circuit has reportedly received a private reprimand from a judicial conduct committee following allegations of inappropriate conduct involving an extramarit...

item.title: Critics dispute Stephen Miller's claims about food stamp eligibility and welfare verification
item.description: A controversy erupted online after White House Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller made comments about welfare programs and food stamp eligibility during a public appearance on May 26, 2026. Miller c...

item.title: Iceland reconsiders EU exploratory talks amid concerns over U.S. security reliability and Arctic tensions
item.description: The article reports that Iceland is re-evaluating its long-standing approach to security and its relationship with the European Union following heightened concern over U.S. foreign policy signals unde...

item.title: Report Claims CBS Mornings Omitted Coverage of Colbert Finale Amid Internal Network Tensions
item.description: A recent report alleges that CBS’s morning program chose not to mention the final episode of “The Late Show With Stephen Colbert” during its broadcast the day after the show aired, despite the signifi...

item.title: Federal judge blocks Trump administration restrictions on academic speech at West Point
item.description: A federal court in New York has issued a ruling blocking enforcement of a Trump administration policy that restricted speech and academic content at the United States Military Academy at West Point. T...

item.title: USDA Plans Closure of Federal Bee Research Lab Amid Nationwide Pollinator Crisis
item.description: The U.S. Department of Agriculture plans to close the Beltsville Agricultural Research Center in Maryland, a historic federal facility that has served as the nation’s leading bee research and disease ...

item.title: Trump criticizes lawmakers over efforts to regulate prediction markets linked to his family
item.description: President Donald Trump issued a strongly worded public statement on Truth Social in which he criticized several prominent political figures for their efforts to regulate prediction markets. In his pos...

item.title: Analysis of Pentagon Memos Suggests Structural Limits Weakened Tulsi Gabbard’s Role as DNI
item.description: The article examines newly public Pentagon memos and commentary from independent journalist Ken Klippenstein regarding the role of Director of National Intelligence (DNI) Tulsi Gabbard in the second T...

item.title: Chinese humanoid home robot demonstrates basic household tasks with limited cooking performance
item.description: A recent demonstration of GigaAI’s humanoid robot, SeeLight S1, has drawn attention after the machine performed a series of household tasks with mixed and often unimpressive results. In a promotional ...

item.title: Fox News Highlights Multiple Polls Showing Declining Approval Ratings for Trump
item.description: A recent Fox News segment focused on President Donald Trump’s declining approval ratings and the Republican Party’s continued loyalty to him despite negative polling trends. During the broadcast, Fox ...

item.title: Seven-Hour Gamma-Ray Burst GRB 250702B Explained by Helium Star Merger
item.description: In 2025, astronomers observed an extraordinary gamma-ray burst designated GRB 250702B that lasted approximately seven hours, or 25,000 seconds, making it the longest on record. Gamma-ray bursts are in...

item.title: Tracker shows progress on Trump administration nominations and Senate confirmations
item.description: The Washington Post, in collaboration with the Partnership for Public Service, is tracking the progress of political nominations for positions in the Trump administration. The data shows that Presiden...

item.title: U.S. and Iran Continue Negotiations Despite New Military Strikes and Regional Tensions
item.description: The United States and Iran continued indirect negotiations aimed at ending the regional conflict despite renewed military actions and growing tensions across the Middle East. U.S. Central Command conf...

item.title: IEBC Denies Election Rigging Claims and Reaffirms Independence Ahead of Kenya’s 2027 General Election
item.description: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) has firmly dismissed allegations suggesting there are plans to rig or manipulate Kenya’s 2027 General Election. In a strong statement, the Co...

item.title: Clashes erupt between protesters and ICE at New Jersey detention center amid disputes over detainee conditions
item.description: Protests continued at Newark, New Jersey’s Delaney Hall detention facility as demonstrators clashed with U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officers amid ongoing allegations about detainee...

item.title: Nevada Governor Joe Lombardo Addresses Concerns Over Trump's Tariffs Impact on State Tourism Economy
item.description: In a recent interview with 2 News Nevada, Republican Nevada Governor Joe Lombardo appeared uncomfortable when questioned about the effects of President Donald Trump's tariff policies on the state's ec...
